title: DuckCraft
description: Minecraft but I added over 400 mods with no sense of cohesion or balance.
body:
Minecraft but I added over 400 mods with no sense of balance or cohesion. I basically just downloaded anything I could find on the Modrinth mod list, this took a while as I had to make sure no mod crashed the game, meaning I had to painstakingly manually disable every mod until I could find the mod that was causing the crash. Anyways, enjoy the pack. Or not.

PolyLib - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polylib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polylib (polylib-2100.0.3-build.159-neoforge.jar)
